title: No Crypto? No Problem: How to Buy Bitcoin & Litecoin Directly Inside Stake with Your Credit Card

excerpt: Think you need to be a tech-wizard to use a crypto casino? Think again. We show you how to start playing on Stake in minutes by buying crypto directly using your Canadian Visa or Mastercard.

ogTitle: Zero to Playing in 60 Seconds: Buying Crypto Directly on Stake
ogDescription: Don't let the word 'Crypto' scare you. Our 2026 guide makes it simple for Canadians to join the world's #1 casino using their everyday credit card.
content:
INSTANT DEPOSITS 2026

One of the most common questions from Canadian players looking to join Stake is: "Do I need to own Bitcoin already?" The answer in 2026 is a definitive **NO.** While Stake is a cryptocurrency-centric platform, they have built a sophisticated bridge for traditional players. Through secure, built-in integrations with global payment leaders, you can exchange your Canadian dollars for high-payout crypto credits in less time than it takes to order a pizza. If you have a Visa or Mastercard in your wallet, you are already ready to play. This guide will walk you through the seamless process of bypassing the complex exchanges and getting straight to the action.

Why Buy Crypto Directly Inside Stake?

Traditionally, buying crypto required registering at a specialized exchange (like Coinbase or Kraken), verifying your ID, waiting for bank transfers, and then manually sending funds to your casino. On **Stake**, this entire process is digitized and condensed into a few clicks within their own 'Cashier' menu.

🔒 Security and Speed

By using the built-in purchase options—like **MoonPay** or **Remik**—you are using services that are fully compliant with North American security standards. Your credit card details are encrypted, and the crypto is delivered directly into your Stake balance. No risk of sending to the wrong wallet address, and no more waiting days for bank approvals.

Step-by-Step: From Credit Card to Jackpot

1

Open the Wallet

Log in to your Stake account and click the 'Wallet' button at the top of the screen. Select the 'Buy Crypto' tab.

2

Choose Your Provider

Stake will offer you a choice (e.g., MoonPay). These are verified partners. Enter the amount in CAD you wish to spend and select your coin (we recommend **Litecoin** for the fastest results).

3

Enter Card Details

A secure window will open. Enter your Canadian Visa or Mastercard information. Once the transaction is confirmed, your Stake balance will update automatically.

Pro Tip: Why We Love Litecoin (LTC) for Beginners

While Bitcoin (BTC) is the most famous, it can sometimes be slow and expensive during busy network times. For the best experience, we always recommend Canadians buy **Litecoin (LTC)** or **Solana (SOL)** inside Stake. They are lightning-fast, confirm in seconds, and have almost zero network fees, meaning more and more of your money goes exactly where you want it: into the games.

Conclusion: The Barrier to Entry is Gone

In 2026, the complexity of crypto should never stop you from enjoying the best gambling platform on earth. Stake has successfully bridged the gap between the familiar ease of credit cards and the incredible efficiency of the blockchain. Whether you're here for the Japanese slots or the NHL lines, your journey starts with a simple, secure card transaction. Isn't it time you saw what all the excitement is about?

💳Buy Crypto and Play on Stake Now💳
